name: Pumpkin Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare the pumpkin and remove seeds. Cut the pulp into cubes.
2. Add sugar to the cubed pumpkin and stir well until combined.
3. Allow mixture to stand overnight.
4. In the morning, add washed and cut dried apricots.
5. Add raisins.
6. Slowly cook while stirring frequently until the pumpkin is tender and clear.
7. Optionally, add a thinly sliced lemon for flavor.
8. Canned pumpkin can be substituted for fresh pumpkin.
